features.featureTitle: Add a new site card to the Games page (`frontend/src/pages/Games.tsx`). The user did not specify a URL in this message — the assistant must prompt the user for the website URL before implementing, or add a placeholder card that is clearly labeled 'New Education Site' with a generic education icon and description 'User-requested educational site', using the URL provided by the user. If no URL was provided, use a visually distinct placeholder card with a note to update the URL. The card must match the existing card style (icon, site name, brief description, neon glow hover, opens in a new proxy iframe tab via the existing `openUrl` mechanism) and fit naturally into the responsive grid layout.
